message.content:
This is the **Categories page** of the ALADIN AI B2B Commerce platform (URL: `aladin-web.vercel.app/products/categories`).  

It is **empty** (no categories exist yet). The page displays a message “No categories yet” with a prompt to “Create your first category to organize products in the catalog,” along with a “Create First Category” button. The sidebar confirms the “Products > Categories” navigation, and the main area shows a placeholder (folder icon) indicating no data is currently present.
